name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (Cover Page)
description: Cover page for the Common Paper Mutual NDA, used to fill in the purpose, term, and governing law before incorporating the Standard Terms.

name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (Standard Terms)
description: Standard terms for a mutual non-disclosure agreement covering the use, protection, and return of confidential information exchanged between two parties.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Standard terms for a SaaS/cloud service subscription, covering access and use, support, payment, data privacy, warranties, liability, and termination.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Standard terms for granting an early-access design partner use of a product in exchange for feedback that helps develop and improve it.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Standard terms defining uptime and support response time targets for a cloud service, along with the service credits and remedies available if targets are missed.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Standard terms for providing professional services under one or more statements of work, covering deliverables, intellectual property, payment, and liability.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Standard terms governing the processing of personal data between a controller/processor and a processor/subprocessor, including international data transfer mechanisms and security incident response.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Standard terms for licensing on-premises or installed software, covering license grants, restrictions, updates, warranties, and liability.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Standard terms for a business partnership arrangement between two companies, including trademark licensing, fees, and confidentiality.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Standard terms for a time-limited trial or evaluation of a product before entering into a longer-term definitive agreement.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Standard terms required under HIPAA governing a business associate's use and protection of protected health information (PHI) on behalf of a covered entity.

name: AI Addendum
description: Standard terms supplementing a product agreement to govern the use of AI/ML features, including input/output ownership, model training restrictions, and AI-specific disclaimers.
